docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Toast

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Toast do use Phoenix.Component import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Icon alias Phoenix.LiveView.JS attr :toasts, :list, default: [] attr :position, :string, default: "bottom-right", values: ~w(top-left top-center top-right bottom-left bottom-center bottom-right) attr :class, :string, default: nil def toast_viewport(assigns) do ~H"""
<.toast_item :for={toast <- @toasts} toast={toast} />
""" end defp toast_position("top-left"), do: "top-0 left-0" defp toast_position("top-center"), do: "top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2" defp toast_position("top-right"), do: "top-0 right-0" defp toast_position("bottom-left"), do: "bottom-0 left-0" defp toast_position("bottom-center"), do: "bottom-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2" defp toast_position("bottom-right"), do: "bottom-0 right-0" attr :toast, :map, required: true def toast_item(assigns) do ~H"""

{@toast.title}

{@toast.description}

""" end end

name: toast
title: Toast
